category_sources: source_facts.description describes libpinyin as a library to deal with pinyin.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and source_facts.homepage identify the project as libpinyin.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub project; its README is the primary documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/libpinyin/libpinyin, so repo is null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies pinyin functionality; source_facts.name identifies libpinyin as a library.
